fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. ticket-api exposes one canonical ticket health report used unchanged by ticket-cli, ticket-http, ticket-mcp, and audit-api. 2. Health findings cover supported ticket features beyond title/description/dependency convergence, with severity rules documented and tested. 3. The audit-api ticket validation reports individual ticket health findings from the canonical ticket health report instead of reimplementing separate ticket graph checks. 4. New-ticket quality checks provide actionable signal for missing component, risk level, acceptance criteria, validation plan, graph participation, and spec traceability without blocking legacy remediation unexpectedly. 5. Focused ticket-api, ticket-cli/MCP or HTTP parity, and audit-api tests prove identical check keys, severities, evidence, and counts across surfaces.
fields.title: [ticket-api][audit-api] Strengthen canonical ticket health validation
